title: karpatiosorbus ratisbonensis
intro: Karpatiosorbus ratisbonensis, also known as the Ratisbon Spindle Tree, is a deciduous shrub native to Central and Eastern Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Karpatiosorbus ratisbonensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
